title: Bulb's McDonalds Mod
description: Now McDonalds spawns everywhere and will sell you every McDonalds Menu Item of 27-9-2025 (At least the McDonalds Menu Within The Netherlands)
body:
![McDonalds Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b2f5792cc680a7633e26891df2e7676fedf9642.png)

It Has Literally Every McDonalds Menu Item!
Every Drink, Hamburger and even those Deserts!
Even the Ice Cream Machine is Working!

What you have to do to get McDonalds Items?
Find a Mcdonalds (they spawn literally everywhere in the overworld except for in oceans)
Speak to a McDonalds Employee.
Trade for McDonalds Tasty Item's!

## McDonalds Mod Trailer!
